parsed_review.summary: CP00-672 is a descriptor-only bridge pack (RP22 External Integrations I, risk A, 10 units, RP22.P02.M06.S15-RP22.P02.M07.S02) covering approval routing, blocked-claim output, rollback, retry, four tests, a service entrypoint contract, and request normalization. Direct read-only inspection confirms full internal consistency: the registry CP672 binding/requirements, deliverable distribution {ui:1,implementation:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,contract:1} and micro-title distribution {Synthetic Fixture Set:8,Test And Golden Case Set:2} match the manifest included_units, prompt baseline, live plan, and next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id CP00-672). The service.js descriptor/case-set/Hermes/Claude/handoff builders and contract projection align with validators.js drift checks and model.test.js assertions; index.js re-exports all required public symbols; both contract files are regenerated for CP00-672 (current_pack CP00-672, historical 666-671, cp672 projection fields, golden_case_payload_included=false). No-write/no-real-data is strongly enforced: freezeCp672Result and the CP666 no-write attestation force every write/runtime/leak flag false, and no fetch/http/child_process/fs-write/db/process.env code paths or secrets/tokens/keys exist anywhere in scope. Authority boundary is respected — claude_is_final_approval=false, claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false — and Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor packet/receipt handling (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false), not product runtime. Review hardening evidence is sound: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1432-byte valid JSON), prompt 2443 bytes within limit, no forbidden tools, no omitted active untracked implementation files, and zero prior invalid review attempts. Pack state is correctly pre-review (manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false, construction-inspection PENDING_PACK_LEVEL_REVIEW), gated on this receipt. Provenance note under the read-only constraint: the 22/22 command-evidence exit codes (npm test, npm run build, closeout/rp22/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check) are agent-reported and were not independently re-executed; this verdict rests on static cross-inspection plus that claimed command evidence. No P0-P3 findings; the pack supports its descriptor-level production_ready closeout claim and Claude remains a read-only reviewer, not the final approver.
